title: GrimoireEntry
description: Schema for Markdown-fronted corpus entries in corpus/entries/

id.description: Unique kebab/snake_case identifier for this entry

epistemic_status.description: How well-supported is this content? documented=verified sources, contested=disputed, speculative=extrapolation, fiction=narrative lore

citations.description: Source references. Required when epistemic_status is 'documented'.

tags.description: Taxonomy tags for filtering and indexing

generated_by.description: If AI-generated, the model or tool identifier (e.g. 'grimoire-cli/generate v1.0')

defensive_focus.description: For security entries: confirms content is framed defensively with no actionable exploit instructions
